title: allowed changes detail enforcement hardening
goal: 既存の changed_files 検証で未カバーの粒度を補強し、許可範囲逸脱を厳格化する
scope: post-patch scope verification for uncovered cases
constraints: must extend only uncovered cases beyond current validate_changed_files behavior
must not duplicate existing checks without added value
must preserve current passing behavior for valid patches
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: invoke validate_allowed_changes_detail_enforcement inside validate_changed_files_before_patch after existing validate_patch_files call
